channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Full U.S. men's soccer schedule for the 2026 World Cup released
item.description: The U.S. men's national team began its 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign with a match against Paraguay at SoFi Stadium on Friday.

item.title: U.S. dominates Paraguay 4-1 in World Cup opener
item.description: The U.S. men's soccer team defeated Paraguay 4-1 at SoFi Stadium in its World Cup opener on Friday.

item.title: Kennedy Center misses deadline to remove Trump's name as government seeks delay
item.description: The Trump administration faces a Friday deadline to remove Trump's name from the building.

item.title: Video: Utah officers break down doors to rescue residents from apartment fire
item.description: Dramatic footage shows police entering flames to save people, including children, from their beds in St. George.
